nodes.name: sparse-inference-wasm/Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the WebAssembly bindings crate (cdylib + rlib) depending on ruvector-sparse-inference and wasm-bindgen.

nodes.name: sparse-inference-wasm/README.md
nodes.summary: README for the WASM bindings crate covering build targets (web, nodejs, bundler), feature flags, and usage examples.

nodes.name: sparse-inference-wasm/lib.rs
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen entry exposing SparseInferenceEngine and EmbeddingModel to JavaScript along with version and inference-time helpers.

nodes.name: SparseInferenceEngine
nodes.summary: JS-exposed sparse inference engine wrapper with constructor, calibrate, infer, sparsity stats, and metadata methods.

nodes.name: EmbeddingModel
nodes.summary: JS-exposed embedding model wrapper with constructor, embed, and streaming-load methods.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen start function that installs console_error_panic_hook.

nodes.name: measure_inference_time
nodes.summary: Browser-side helper that runs a benchmark loop and returns elapsed milliseconds.

nodes.name: version
nodes.summary: Returns the crate version string for the JS side.

nodes.name: sparse-inference-wasm/tests/web.rs
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen-test suite covering engine creation, metadata, sparsity stats, embedding/LLM construction, and bad-URL streaming behavior.
